DoraDoor - Windows
===================

Quick Start:

1. Edit config.yaml - fill in your database, Redis, and API key settings
2. Double-click start.bat or run: doradoor.exe -config config.yaml
3. Open http://localhost:3001/admin

Requirements:
- PostgreSQL 16+
- Redis 7+

Config:
- doradoor.exe    - Main program
- config.yaml     - Configuration file
- start.bat       - One-click launcher
- web/            - Admin UI static files
